JSON.MERGE.summary: Merge JSON values at the specified path. Creates a new key if it does not exist, or merges new values with existing values if the key already exists.
JSON.MERGE.complexity: O(M+N) when path evaluates to a single value, where M is the size of the original value and N is the size of the new value. O(P*(M_avg+N)) when path evaluates to multiple values, where P is the number of matched paths, M_avg is the average size of original values, and N is the size of the new value.
